globalNews.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
globalNews.summary: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.

globalNews.title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
globalNews.summary: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.

globalNews.title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
globalNews.summary: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.

globalNews.title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
globalNews.summary: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.

globalNews.title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
globalNews.summary: Some protesters demanding education reforms said they were injured in clashes with police who banned the march.

cryptoNews.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
cryptoNews.summary: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
cryptoNews.summary: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

cryptoNews.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
cryptoNews.summary: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

aiNews.title: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
aiNews.summary: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.

aiNews.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
aiNews.summary: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast a shadow over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

aiNews.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
aiNews.summary: Current AI, a nonprofit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat, and more.

aiNews.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
aiNews.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."
